name: setChatMemberTag
description: Use this method to set a tag for a regular member in a group or a supergroup. The bot must be an administrator in the chat for this to work and must have the can_manage_tags administrator right

parameters.name: chat_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the target chat or username of the target supergroup in the format @username

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the target user

parameters.name: tag
parameters.description: New tag for the member; 0-16 characters, emoji are not allowed
